## Session — 2026-04-29 10:30

Continued work on the search pipeline integration tests. Identified a gap in coverage for temporal queries spanning multiple agent memory directories. Added three new test scenarios to the BDD suite.

### Decisions

- [decision] Temporal chunks should include a recency decay factor with a 30-day half-life
- [decision] Memory log filenames must follow the YYYY-MM-DD.md convention strictly

### Pending Items

- [pending] Write integration tests for the briefing source fetcher
- [pending] Validate that the scanner correctly handles Unicode filenames
- [pending] Check if the FTS5 index rebuild is idempotent across repeated scans

### Actions

- [action: builder] Deploy the updated search service to the staging environment

### Notes

Good progress on the temporal index. The BM25 scorer now correctly handles prefix matching with quoted tokens. Need to verify that the session update extraction logic in the briefing pipeline captures all tagged items including those with nested brackets.
